allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update product info, rebrand to Day Zero Solutions, add chatbot and contact form

- Fix NutriCare: dietary management for aged care \(not nutrition labelling\)
- Fix RestroStock: status changed to Live \(v1.0.0\), added procurement features
- Rebrand to Day Zero Solutions with "From Day Zero to Day One" tagline
- Replace Crisp with custom chatbot widget \(product Q&A, contact capture\)
- Wire contact form to Formsubmit.co for email delivery to hello@day-zero.com.au
- Remove all em dashes, update stats to 2 Live / 1 In Dev, copyright 2026

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(grep -n "disclaimer\\|general information\\|not a substitute\\|professional advice\\|legal\\|liability" resources/*.html -i)

Bash(sed -i 's/<body>/<body class=""light-hero"">/' resources/iddsi-checklist.html resources/must-screening-guide.html resources/aged-care-dietary-documentation-checklist.html resources/inventory-template.html privacy.html)
